extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won the sprint after Deceuninck leadout delivered him perfectly, holding off PHILIPSEN's late corner attack in the final 25 meters.
tactical_patterns: Movistar attacked at 100km out in crosswinds despite being 60 miles from finish, fracturing peloton at 50+ mph speeds.
PHILIPSEN attacked on the final corner attempting to preempt sprint leadout trains, nearly stealing stage before BENNETT's superior late acceleration.
Deceuninck's leadout proved decisive in chaotic closing kilometers that BENNETT himself described as scary, suggesting organized trains dominate sketchy finishes.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: demonstrated rare late-race acceleration depth, catching PHILIPSEN after corner attack in final 25m despite admitting doubt mid-sprint
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: tactical aggression on final corner nearly succeeded, revealing willingness to break sprint conventions when conditions are sketchy
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: fourth place finish described as disappointing by commentary, suggesting form deficit to BENNETT despite previous stage win expectations
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: continues dominating jersey count but GC contenders avoided time bonuses, signaling conservative approach on non-mountain stages
